title: oroya peruviana var. citriflora
intro: Oroya peruviana var. citriflora, also known as yellow flowering Oroya, is a variety of the Oroya peruviana plant, a flowering plant native to the Andean regions of Peru and Bolivia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Oroya peruviana var. citriflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other female health issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
